What I Offer

Evidence-based psychiatric services

Comprehensive mental health care designed around your individual needs — not a one-size-fits-all approach.

Psychiatric Evaluation

Thorough initial evaluation to understand your history, symptoms, and goals — the foundation of a meaningful treatment plan.

Medication Management

Careful, personalized prescribing and ongoing monitoring to optimize your treatment while minimizing side effects.

Collaborative Therapy

Sessions built on open dialogue and shared decision-making — your voice shapes every step of your care.

Telehealth Sessions

Convenient, secure video appointments from the comfort of your home — same quality of care, greater flexibility.

Areas of Focus

Conditions I treat

With expertise across a broad range of mental health conditions, I provide compassionate, individualized care for each unique journey.

Anxiety Depression ADHD Bipolar Disorder PTSD & Trauma OCD Insomnia Life Transitions Grief & Bereavement Stress Management Mood Disorders College Mental Health

I work best with individuals who want a collaborative relationship with their provider — people who value open communication.

My philosophy centers on meeting you exactly where you are, without judgment, and building a path forward together.

Shared decision-making at every step
Culturally sensitive & affirming care
Evidence-based, person-centered approach
Respect for your autonomy and values
About Jennifer

A provider who listens

Jennifer Bruno is a Board-Certified Psychiatric Mental Health Nurse Practitioner (PMHNP) serving patients in Miami, FL. She is passionate about making quality psychiatric care accessible, approachable, and genuinely responsive to each patient's individual needs.

Working through Grow Therapy, Jennifer is dedicated to reducing barriers to mental health care — whether that means accepting your insurance, offering flexible telehealth appointments, or simply taking the time to truly hear you.

Board-Certified PMHNP — nationally certified in psychiatric mental health nursing

Miami, FL 33130 — in-person and statewide telehealth available

Managed by Grow Therapy — seamless insurance verification and scheduling

Feel free to ask about qualifications, training, and treatment experience

$21 avg. session cost with insurance
2 care formats — in-person & online
10+ insurance plans accepted
1:1 personalized, collaborative care

Getting Started

Your path to wellbeing

Beginning care is simpler than you think. Here's what to expect when you reach out.

1

Reach Out

Call or email to connect. A representative will help verify your insurance and answer initial questions.

2

Initial Evaluation

A comprehensive first session to understand your history, symptoms, and what you're hoping to achieve.

3

Personalized Plan

Together, we build a treatment plan tailored to your specific needs, values, and goals.

4

Ongoing Support

Regular follow-ups to refine your treatment and track your progress toward lasting wellbeing.

Take the First Step

Ready to feel like yourself again?

You don't have to navigate this alone. Reach out today — Jennifer is accepting new patients and would be honored to support your mental health journey.
